Container.Name: unifi-syslog-analyzer
Container.Overview:
Zone-pair traffic mining and live dashboard from UniFi firewall syslog. Point your UDM / UniFi OS gateway's syslog at this container and it aggregates the firewall log into zone-to-zone flow groups (LAN -> IoT, Guest -> WAN, ...), consolidates port ranges, flags rule candidates and port scans, and exports the result as CSV - the batch rule-mining companion to firewall-live-log, which is the always-on live view.
Network/zone names come from the UniFi API (set UNIFI_HOST plus an API key) and/or a static NETWORKS_JSON table for non-UniFi setups. Zero dependencies - pure Python standard library, one container.
SETUP: the container runs as UID 10001, so the data folder must be writable by it: chown -R 10001:10001 /mnt/user/appdata/unifi-syslog-analyzer (or chmod -R 777). Then point the gateway's syslog at this host on the syslog port and open the dashboard.
Container.Requires: A data folder writable by UID 10001. For automatic zone names: a UniFi controller reachable at UNIFI_HOST with a local API key.

Config.Name: Syslog Port (UDP)
Config.Description: UDP port the gateway ships its firewall syslog to.

Config.Name: Data Folder
Config.Description: Holds flows.db (the aggregated SQLite flow store). Must be writable by UID 10001.

Config.Name: UniFi controller URL
Config.Description: Controller/console URL for network+zone enumeration, e.g. https://192.168.1.1 - leave empty to skip the UniFi API and use a static NETWORKS_JSON instead.

Config.Name: UniFi API key
Config.Description: Local API key (preferred auth; the only mode that works when MFA is enforced on the console). Create one under the console's Control Plane -> Integrations.

Config.Name: UniFi username
Config.Description: Legacy username/password fallback - local no-MFA admin accounts only. Prefer the API key.

Config.Name: UniFi password
Config.Description: Password for the legacy fallback login.

Config.Name: UniFi verify SSL
Config.Description: true to verify the controller's TLS certificate (default false: self-signed).

Config.Name: Networks refresh (min)
Config.Description: How often to re-enumerate networks/zones from the UniFi API.

Config.Name: Static networks JSON
Config.Description: Path (inside the container, e.g. /data/networks.json) to a static network table: JSON list of {name, cidr, zone[, vlan_id, gateway_ip]}. Used instead of / in addition to the UniFi API - handy for non-UniFi firewalls.

Config.Name: Database path
Config.Description: Path of the SQLite database inside the container. Leave at the default.

Config.Name: HTTP bind address
Config.Description: Address the dashboard listens on inside the container. Leave at 0.0.0.0.

Config.Name: Unparsed line cap
Config.Description: How many raw unparseable syslog lines are kept for diagnosis.
